name: X-Golf Kenosha
about: X-Golf Kenosha offers indoor golf simulation using state-of-the-art technology, including camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors, for a highly accurate and realistic experience. The venue provides 7 simulator bays, a full bar, food service, and event spaces, making it suitable for both individual practice and group activities. Pricing is per bay, per hour, accommodating up to 6 people, with various discounts available for seniors, military, and first responders.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate golf simulator technology
Accommodates up to 6 players per simulator bay
Full bar and food menu available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Shareable bites, delicious appetizers, snacks, pizzas and more available
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails and wines available

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, though rental clubs are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as being allowed. The venue offers a full bar and food menu on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes 1 hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. If you have more than one player, you may want to book an additional hour for each person in your group.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome at X-Golf Kenosha.
